response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship credentials, but his profile diverges sharply from this role's mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His career since has centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB instead) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was a fintech product role, not capital markets systems work. The gap between his trajectory and this consulting engagement's core needs is too wide to justify an interview.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience with strong testing, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/second)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
